kept.text:
America 250th

After the French and Indian War Britain was deeply in debt and turned to the American colonies for revenue. The colonists resisted, insisting they could not be taxed without their consent. The crisis that followed forced Americans to define their rights and almost started the Revolution more than a decade before independence.

This is the story of the Stamp Act Crisis.
